overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a rainy futuristic city. The scene features wet neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians with umbrellas crossing intersections beneath towering glass buildings and overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with green railings approaching hotel intersection

events.description: slight left turn while proceeding along the walkway
approaching intersection, traffic light and crosswalk become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway toward the hotel building

entered.detail: Multi-story building with large illuminated HOTEL signage on roof
Green metal railings lining the elevated pedestrian walkway on both sides
Illuminated PAWNSHOP sign on building facade
Sleek black futuristic vehicles parked along the left side
Tall vertical digital screen with red neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy elevated walkway with green railings, moving toward a large hotel building with illuminated signage. Futuristic parked cars line the left side while the camera walks steadily forward, making a slight left turn as it approaches the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: traffic light changes from green to red
turning right to cross the street with the crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection alongside pedestrians holding colorful umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with colorful umbrellas crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: Tall traffic signal pole with illuminated red and green lights
White zebra crossing lines painted on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the wet asphalt alongside a crowd carrying umbrellas. The traffic light changes from green to red as pedestrians flow across the crosswalk, with the hotel building now visible to the right and vertical digital billboards lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath overpass with digital advertisements

events.description: camera adjusts to reveal third-person player character in red jacket with yellow collar

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a group of pedestrians with umbrellas, passing under an overpass

notable_agents.action: player character wearing red jacket with yellow collar walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: Elevated concrete highway structure spanning across the street ahead
Large horizontal advertisement screen displaying product images on building facade
Tall tropical palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk
Modern street light pole with extended horizontal arm

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet sidewalk following a crowd with umbrellas, the camera approaches an overpass bridge spanning the street. Digital billboards and palm trees line the right side while moderate traffic flows on the left. Near the end of the segment, the camera reveals the player character in a distinctive red jacket walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy elevated walkway into a bustling, neon-lit city intersection and along a crowded futuristic thoroughfare. It begins by moving past green railings and parked futuristic cars toward a large hotel with illuminated signage, making a slight left turn as it approaches the street level. As the camera descends into a wide intersection, the scene opens up to show a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas crossing wet asphalt while traffic lights shift from green to red beneath towering digital billboards. The movement then shifts to a wet sidewalk, passing palm trees and flowing traffic as the camera approaches a massive overpass bridge. Finally, the perspective settles behind a player character in a distinctive red jacket who leads the way through the rainy urban landscape.
